questions.scenario: A role change updates Nginx config for two production web hosts. You want a preview against one host before touching the fleet. Which first run is safest?

options.text: `ansible-playbook -i inventory/prod.yml site.yml --limit all` because production has only two hosts.
`ansible-playbook site.yml` without inventory because Ansible can infer production hosts.
`ansible-playbook -i inventory/prod.yml site.yml --check` and ignore the target because check mode cannot affect anything.

questions.explanation: A careful first preview uses the real inventory, a narrow limit, check mode, and diff mode. Check mode reduces risk but does not replace intentional target selection.
